overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a scenic mountain path. The character walks along a rocky cliffside trail past tribal wooden structures and totems, with misty valleys and dense forests visible in the distance below.

events.description: character steps off the wooden platform onto the rocky mountain trail

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks forward from the wooden overlook platform onto the mountain path, passing decorative tribal totems on both sides

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with log railings and purple tribal cloth decorations
wooden totem with purple and blue painted decorations and cloth wrappings
steep gray rock cliff face rising vertically beside the path
dense forested valley below with mist rising between the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wooden tribal overlook platform with decorative totems. Aloy walks forward onto a rocky mountain trail, passing the totems as the path opens to reveal a steep cliff face on the left and a misty forested valley far below on the right.

events.description: vegetation becomes denser with bushes lining both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues walking steadily along the narrow mountain path with the steep cliff on her left and the misty valley descending to her right

entered.detail: green leafy bushes and small plants growing alongside the rocky path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open mountain trail, Aloy moves away from the starting platform as the tribal totems disappear behind her. The path winds along the cliffside with dense vegetation appearing along the edges, while the misty valley remains visible far below to the right.

events.description: large wooden tribal structure built into the cliff comes into view ahead on the left
character passes the wooden tribal structure, moving from approaching to moving away

agents.ego_description: Aloy approaches and passes a large wooden tribal structure built into the cliff face, continuing along the winding mountain path

entered.detail: large complex wooden structure built into the cliff with platforms, beams, and purple tribal decorations

segments.scene_description: As Aloy continues along the trail, a large wooden tribal structure built into the cliff face comes into view on the left. She walks past the intricate construction of logs and platforms, after which the structure falls behind as the path continues winding through the mountainous terrain with lush vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged mountain trail that transitions from a tribal overlook into a winding cliffside path. It begins on a wooden platform adorned with decorative totems, moving forward as Aloy steps onto a rocky trail that opens to reveal a steep cliff face and a misty forested valley far below. As she advances, the starting platform and totems recede behind her, and the path winds further along the precipice where dense vegetation begins to line the edges of the trail. The scene then shifts as a large, intricate wooden tribal structure built into the cliff face comes into view on the left. Finally, the camera follows her past these log platforms before the construction falls away, leaving the path to wind through the lush, mountainous terrain.
